name: New Fortress Energy Inc.
business: New Fortress Energy Inc. owns and operates natural gas and liquefied natural gas (LNG) infrastructure, and an integrated fleet of ships and logistics assets to deliver turnkey energy solutions to global markets. It supplies LNG and natural gas to its own power plants and to customers, and also sells power directly. The company focuses on operational efficiency and cost-effective completion of in-process development projects.

exposures.sentence: We own and operate natural gas and liquefied natural gas (LNG) infrastructure, and an integrated fleet of ships and logistics assets to rapidly deliver turnkey energy solutions to global markets.

catalysts.event: New 7-year gas supply agreement with PREPA awarded
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we were awarded a new 7-year gas supply agreement with PREPA to deliver up to 75 TBtu of natural gas annually from our San Juan Facility.

catalysts.event: 10-year gas sales agreement with CFE executed
catalysts.sentence: In the third quarter of 2024, we executed a 10-year gas sales agreement to supply natural gas to additional CFE facilities on take-or-pay basis.

catalysts.event: Barcarena Power Plant placed into service
catalysts.sentence: We expect to place the Barcarena Power Plant into service in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Puerto Sandino terminal and power plant commissioned
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the construction of the terminal and commission both the terminal and the power plant during 2026.

catalysts.event: Commencement of LNG supply under long-term contract
catalysts.sentence: We have binding contracts for LNG volumes from two separate U.S. LNG facilities, each with a 20-year term, which are expected to commence in 2027 and 2029.
